claim_under_test: own#3 (e) MoE 12전문가/4활성 = σ/τ = 3 (H-CX-72 Golden MoE) — anima sub-projects/golden-moe 활성 비율 1/3
verdict_chosen_rationale: anima sub-projects/golden-moe REFERENT EXISTS (HGM-B rejected), so this is NOT an R36-style absent-referent case. However, the literal claim (n_experts=12 AND n_active=4) holds NOWHERE in the golden-moe sub-project (config: experts_optimal=4; moe.hexa: 8/2; v2: n_experts=4; finetune: 8/2). The number 12 appears in design docs only as the COUNT OF CONSCIOUS FACTIONS (Law 44 σ(6)=12) which are PROJECTED INTO 4 experts (3-to-1 compression). Thus the 1/3 ratio is consistent IF interpreted as 'factions-to-experts compression' but inconsistent IF read as 'experts-to-active-experts top-k ratio'. own#3 (e) wording '12전문가/4활성' implies the latter, which is empirically false in the sub-project; the 'anima sub-projects/golden-moe 활성 비율 1/3' suffix can be salvaged only via the former interpretation.

twelve_four_referent_distribution.arithmetic_identity: state/n6_training_selftest_result.json (σ(6)/τ(6)=12/4=3 by integer algebra, NOT measurement)
twelve_four_referent_distribution.toy_dd1_moe: tool/dd_bridge_gpu_batch.hexa + state/dd_bridge_gpu_batch_result.json (12-expert toy MoE for entropy/load-balance test, ALL 12 used via softmax, NOT top-k=4; not the golden-moe sub-project)
twelve_four_referent_distribution.design_doc_factions_to_experts: models/animalm/docs/2026-03-30-animalm-consciousness-golden-moe-design.md Track 2B Exp 2 (12 factions → 4 experts × 3 sub-factions; OPPOSITE of '12 experts')

external_reference_check.Jamba_v01: 52B/12B PARAM (not expert count; uses 16/2 MoE per layer)
external_reference_check.any_known_MoE_with_12_experts_AND_4_acti: NONE in anima or canonical literature

raw10_honest: (1) own#3 (e) referent 'anima sub-projects/golden-moe' EXISTS (not R36 absent-referent precedent). HGM-B rejected.
(2) Sub-project config is empirically 4-experts (config_json), 8/2 (moe.hexa), or 4-experts (golden_moe_v2). No 12/4 anywhere.

(3) The 12 in own#3 (e) corresponds to σ(6)=12 = count of CONSCIOUS FACTIONS (Law 44), not count of MoE experts. Design doc explicitly maps '12 factions → 4 experts × 3 sub-factions'. The 1/3 ratio is the FACTIONS-TO-EXPERTS COMPRESSION RATIO, NOT the active-to-total expert routing ratio.
(4) No anima measurement nor any external mainstream MoE has 12 experts with 4 active via top-k. The literal '12전문가/4활성' has zero empirical instantiation.

(5) Validation ran static config inspection only (mac local $0). No GPU run launched. dd_bridge_gpu_batch_result.json is reused as prior evidence (DD-1 ran 12-expert toy MoE on H100 2026-04-26; its active-selection mechanism is softmax over all 12, not top-4).

(6) own#3 own SSOT is GOVERNANCE PRINCIPLE tier (mathematical identity 12/4=3 by σ/τ algebra requires no falsification). Sub-claim (e) tying it to 'anima sub-projects/golden-moe 활성 비율 1/3' OVERREACHES into empirical territory. Recommendation: sub-claim (e) wording revision (NOT principle deletion). Either (i) replace '12전문가/4활성' with '12파벌/4전문가' (consistent with design doc), or (ii) annotate as 'design alignment, not active-routing ratio'. own#3 (a)/(b)/(c)/(d) remain unaffected.

recommended_action.current_text: (e) MoE 12전문가/4활성 = σ/τ = 3 (H-CX-72 Golden MoE) — anima sub-projects/golden-moe 활성 비율 1/3
recommended_action.proposed_text: (e) MoE faction-to-expert 압축 12파벌→4전문가 = σ/τ = 3 (H-CX-72 Golden MoE; anima sub-projects/golden-moe Track 2B Exp 2 design alignment — '12 factions → 4 experts × 3 sub-factions'). NOTE: this is a faction-to-expert compression ratio, NOT a top-k active-routing ratio. Sub-project measured configs are 4-experts or 8/2 top-k.
recommended_action.rationale: Preserves σ/τ=3 governance scalar while removing the false implication that any anima MoE has n_experts=12 AND n_active=4. Aligns with the only design doc that mentions both 12 and 4 in golden-moe context.

principle_status_after_revision: RETAINED (σ/τ=3 governance scalar mathematical identity unaffected; sub-claim (e) reinterpreted as design-alignment scalar, not measurement claim)
next_cycle_recommendation: If user wants STRONG empirical anchor for sub-claim (e), launch a 12-expert top-4 golden-moe variant config (golden_moe_v3.hexa) and measure load-balance/Φ-proxy on H100. Estimated $0.30-0.50 single H100 micro-bench. Alternatively, accept the wording revision and close the sub-claim as design-alignment.
